title: Navigation Walk
description: Allows this entity to generate paths by walking around and jumping up and down a block like regular mobs.

can_break_doors.description: Whether the entity can break doors.

can_open_doors.description: Whether the pathfinder can open doors.

can_pass_doors.description: Whether the pathfinder can pass through doors.

can_path_over_water.description: Whether the pathfinder can path over water.

can_sink.description: Whether the entity can sink in water.
